name: Guangdong Failong Crystal Technology Co.,LTD.
summary: Guangdong Failong Crystal Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and marketing of frequency control and selection components in China. Its products include SMD glass, SMD seam sealing, DIP crystal resonators, and TCXO, as well as quartz crystal oscillators for use in electronics industries, such as computer network peripherals, wireless communication, mobile phone, vehicle, GPS, digital audiovisuals, and remote control devices, as well as medical equipment, laptops, TVs, PCs, smart meters, automotive electronics, and aerospace applications. The company also sells its products in Europe, the United States, Japan, Korea, Hong Kong, and Taiwan. Guangdong Failong Crystal Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Dongguan, China.
